summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 2 warning, 7 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: 🔴 iteration-escalation — Persistent eval warning: fabricated-refs recurred in iterations 1, 2

Tests run locally: **591 pass / 0 fail**. The new `test/brainstorm-cmd.test.mjs` directly covers both the bullet list and the fenced markdown example in `buildBrainstormBrief`, plus the interactive-spec path — closing the prior 🟡 gap about the brainstorm-cmd brief lacking direct coverage. The test regex (`^##\s+${section}`, "mi") is identical to `validateSpecFile` at `bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs:425`, so the tests are a faithful validation proxy.
